nasb.text: And He also told this parable to some people who trusted in themselves that they were righteous, and viewed others with contempt:

esv.text: He also told this parable to some who trusted in themselves that they were righteous, and treated others with contempt:

cnv.text: 耶穌向那些自恃為義、輕視別人的人，講了這個比喻：

ccb.text: 耶稣对那些自以为义、藐视别人的人讲了一个比喻：

csbs.text: 耶稣还对某些自以为义而藐视其他人的，讲了这个比喻：
